Soma Isolux NH One Tollway Private Limited (Appellant) V /s Harish Kumar Puri and others (Respondents) hereby makes following amendment in the Notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Shipping, Road 2814 GI/2014 -- 1 of 2 -- Transport and Highways (Department of Road Transport and Highways) bearing S.O. No. 926 (E) dated 6th April, 2009, published in the Gazette of India Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii) namely :— Notes: 7. For Location of Toll Plaza (Chainage) Read as Location of Toll Plaza (Chainage) (i) Km. 146.400 Km 111-483 (Near Gharaunda Town) of NH-1 [F. No. NHAI//13013/428/CO/08-09/GC-Ambala (Panipat-Jalandhar)BOT] ALKESH SHARMA, Jt. Secy. Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] -- 2 of 2 --
